zh.Of Enfield, Middlesex, England: 英國英格蘭米德萊可恩費爾德
zh.Enfield, Middlesex, England, United King: 英國英格蘭米德萊可恩費爾德
zh.Enfield, Middlesex, England: 英國米德萊可恩費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wroth於1450年出生在英國英格蘭米德萊可恩費爾德時，他的父親John Wroth Esq.25歲，母親Elizabeth Lewknor16歲。他於1478年與Joan Margaret Newdigate在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1518年在英國米德萊可恩費爾德享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wroth于1450年出生在英国英格兰米德萊可恩費爾德时，他的父亲John Wroth Esq.25岁，母亲Elizabeth Lewknor16岁。他于1478年与Joan Margaret Newdigate在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1518年在英国米德萊可恩費爾德享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wroth was born in 1450, in Enfield, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Wroth Esq., was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Lewknor, was 16. He married Joan Margaret Newdigate in 1478, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1518, in Enfield, Middlesex, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wroth est né en 1450, à Enfield, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Wroth Esq., avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lewknor, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Joan Margaret Newdigate en 1478, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1518, à Enfield, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wroth 1450 in Enfield, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wroth Esq. 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Lewknor 16. Er hat 1478 in England, United Kingdom Joan Margaret Newdigate geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1518 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Enfield, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wroth è nato il nel 1450 nel Enfield, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Wroth Esq., aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Lewknor, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Joan Margaret Newdigate nel 1478, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1518, nel Enfield, Middlesex, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wrothが1450年にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスエンフィールドで生まれた時，父John Wroth Esq.は25歳，母Elizabeth Lewknorは16歳であった。1478年にイギリスイギリスでJoan Margaret Newdigateと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1518年にイギリスミッドレセックスエンフィールドで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wroth(이)가 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wroth Esq.(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Lewknor(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1478년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joan Margaret Newdigate(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1518년 영국 미들레세스 필드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wroth nasceu em 1450, em Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Wroth Esq., tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lewknor, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Margaret Newdigate em 1478, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1518, em Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wroth родился в 1450 г. в местности энфиелд, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Wroth Esq. было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lewknor, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Margaret Newdigate в 1478 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1518 г. в местности энфиелд, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Wroth nació en 1450, en Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Wroth Esq., tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Lewknor, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Joan Margaret Newdigate en 1478, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1518, en Enfield, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
